_comment: LFLP Annecy Meythet - IFR departure RWY 22. Tests: (1) holding point D not G1, (2) no auto-taxi without request, (3) Chambery Approach label, (4) departure handoff above CTR upper (2481 AGL), (5) frequency guard.
name: ifr_lflp_rwy22

say.note: Step 1 — IFR clearance request on Tower (tower_only airport).
say.text: Annecy Tower, November One One One, request IFR clearance to Ajaccio, information Alpha.

say.note: Step 2 — Pilot reads back clearance. ATC approves startup.
say.text: Cleared to LFKJ via AMBET 2 Alpha, climb 6000, squawk 1010, QNH 1020, November One One One.

say.note: Step 3 — Frequency guard: wrong frequency (APPROACH) in ground state must be silently dropped.
say.text: Annecy Tower, November One One One, request taxi.

say.note: Step 4 — Correct frequency (TOWER). Explicit 'request taxi' triggers clearance. Holding point must be D not G1.
say.text: Annecy Tower, November One One One, request taxi.

say.note: Step 5 — Pilot reports at holding point D, ready for departure.
say.text: Annecy Tower, November One One One, holding point Delta, ready for departure.

say.note: Step 6 — Aircraft climbing, below CTR upper (2000 AGL < 2481). Move 6 NM SSW (RWY 22 track) so flight_phase detects CLIMB (not PATTERN). Handoff must NOT fire.
Step 7 — Above CTR upper (2600 AGL > 2481). Handoff fires. Controller label must be 'Chambery' not 'Annecy'.
Step 8 — Frequency guard: TOWER freq rejected in IFR_EN_ROUTE state.
say.text: Chambery Approach, November One One One, passing 4000, IFR to Ajaccio.

say.note: Step 9 — Correct APPROACH frequency accepted. Radar contact response.
say.text: Chambery Approach, November One One One, passing 4000, IFR to Ajaccio.
